chunks.text:
## AGING ADVISORY COUNCIL MEETING MINUTES MAY 28, 2026

The Milwaukee County Aging Advisory Council convened in-person at West Allis Senior Center (7001 W. National Avenue, Milwaukee). Members and attendees also joined virtually.
chunks.heading: AGING ADVISORY COUNCIL MEETING MINUTES MAY 28, 2026

chunks.text:
## AGING ADVISORY COUNCIL MEETING MINUTES MAY 28, 2026

The Milwaukee County Aging Advisory Council convened in-person at West Allis Senior Center (7001 W. National Avenue, Milwaukee). Members and attendees also joined virtually.

## Members Present

Ellen Pimentel, Chair

Judith Amorsen

Karen Guszkowski

Gloria Miller

Megan Newman

Amy O'Connor

Cassandra Robinson

Nancy Simuel

Linda Stone
chunks.heading: Members Present

chunks.text:
## Members Present

Ellen Pimentel, Chair

Joanne Allbaugh

Deborah Lewis

chunks.text:
## Members Excused

Commissioner Paula Penebaker, Ex Officio

chunks.heading: Staff Present

chunks.text:
## Staff Present

Daniel Idzikowski, DHHS-AAA Kayla Steinke , DHHS-AAA
## MINUTES
chunks.heading: MINUTES

chunks.text:
## I. CALL TO ORDER AND ROLL CALL

Advisory Council Chair, Ellen Pimentel, called the meeting to order at 1:10 p.m., and Director Idzikowski called the roll. A quorum of Council members was present.
chunks.heading: I. CALL TO ORDER AND ROLL CALL

chunks.text:
## I. CALL TO ORDER AND ROLL CALL

Advisory Council Chair, Ellen Pimentel, called the meeting to order at 1:10 p.m., and Director Idzikowski called the roll. A quorum of Council members was present.

## II. REVIEW AND APPROVAL OF APRIL 23, 2026 ADVISORY COUNCIL MEETING MINUTES

MOTION : To approve the April 23, 2026 Advisory Council meeting minutes. ACTION : Motion prevailed by unanimous consent (Guszkowski moved, O ' Connor second).

- III. REPORT FROM ADVISORY COUNCIL EX-OFFICIO MEMBER

Ex Officio Member Paula Penebaker was not present to provide a report.

- IV. REPORT ON THE AGE FRIENDLY MILWAUKEE COUNTY STEERING COMMITTEE

- Director Idzikowski provided a brief summary of the Age Friendly Steering Committee areas of concern and noted that the Committee is now considering Affordable and Accessible Housing.
- V. PRESENTATION  ON  MILWAUKEE  COUNTY  AREA  AGENCY  ON  AGING CAREGIVER  SUPPORT  PROGRAMS  AND  2025-2027  AREA  AGING  PLAN CAREGIVER SUPPORT GOALS

Caregiver Program Coordinator Kayla Steinke provided a presentation on the National Family Caregiver Support Program and the Wisconsin Alzheimer ' s Caregiver Family Support Program, as well as progress on the caregiver goals in the 2025-27 Area Aging Plan. The Council discussed with no action taken.

- VI.  IDENTIFICATION OF AREAS OF UNMET NEED

Director Idzikowski briefly discussed the role of the Council in assessing unmet need in the aging community and urged Council members to review the Area Aging Plan and think about areas of particular interest to each member.

- VII.  ANNOUNCEMENTS AND ENGAGEMENT OPPORTUNITIES

Coordinator Steinke shared upcoming caregiver support activities. The Council discussed with no action taken.

- VIII.  ADJOURNMENT

MOTION : To adjourn. ACTION : Motion prevailed by unanimous consent (Stone moved, Robinson

second).

Meeting adjourned at 2:45 p.m. The next Aging Advisory Council meeting is June 25, 2026.

Recorder: Daniel Idzikowski Aging Services Director
chunks.heading: II. REVIEW AND APPROVAL OF APRIL 23, 2026 ADVISORY COUNCIL MEETING MINUTES

Coordinator Steinke shared upcoming caregiver support activities. The Council discussed with no action taken.
MOTION : To adjourn. ACTION : Motion prevailed by unanimous consent (Stone moved, Robinson
Meeting adjourned at 2:45 p.m. The next Aging Advisory Council meeting is June 25, 2026.
Recorder: Daniel Idzikowski Aging Services Director
